synopsis:
Star Wars Leia, Princess of Alderaan, Vol. 2 is a trade paperback compilation of Leia Organa: Ordeal of the Princess, a manga adaptation of Claudia Gray's Leia, Princess of Alderaan junior novel.
A long time ago in a galaxy far, far away.... On planet Crate, [sic] Leia met her father, Bail Organa, who was meeting with a mysterious armed group. After Leia learned the truth of her father's investigation mission, she decides to fight against the Empire herself.  What awaits Leia in the next target, Naboo system?
title: Leia, Princess of Alderaan, Vol. 2 (Manga)
